asset_name: Static branch obstacle — wide lane gate
shared_properties: The obstacle keeps the same wood palette and flat shading logic as art_000006.
The branch maintains a collision-friendly low profile for fair lane judgement.
Twig forks stay secondary to the main trunk silhouette.
differences: This variant extends the trunk width to reduce the recoverable gap during mid-depth sections.
The center mass is thicker than art_000006 to make steering commitment more obvious.
The right-side twig group is denser to create a more dramatic silhouette under scrolling motion.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the core loop, timing windows, obstacle pacing, UI layout, and Bevy target constraints.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the sepia autumn atmosphere, tree silhouettes, and warm color layering.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle obstacle entity with a fixed AABB collider and stage-density tags for mid-depth spawn tables.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/art_000007.png during stage setup and attach a fixed collider sized to the authored branch rectangle.
runtime_notes: Spawn this variant in 600px to 1700px depth bands where the player needs cleaner steering reads.
Mirror the texture at spawn time when lane composition requires the thicker fork cluster on the opposite side.
Keep the collider inset by 2px from the painted twig tips so the visual silhouette remains slightly stricter than the hitbox.

context.usage: Wider branch gate used after the player enters the denser fall segments.

shape.silhouette: Long horizontal branch with a broader center mass and four twig clusters that compress the passable lane.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 360x16px with transparent padding removed from the outer bounds.
The silhouette keeps a continuous trunk thickness of at least 3 pixels across the middle 200 pixels of the sprite.
Twig clusters remain visually subordinate to the trunk so the player can read the main blocking shape at a glance.
